\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}

\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}

$. We can write a Kuramoto-like equation for these nodal phases:contentReference[oaicite:53]{index=53}: \[ \dot{\Omega}_i^{\mathrm{node}} = \nu_i + \sum_{j \neq i} C_{ij}\,\sin\!\big(\Omega_j^{\mathrm{node}} - \Omega_i^{\mathrm{node}}\big)\,. \tag{12}\] Here $
